Thursday, June 18.description:
Ary, since next Thursday is your only available day and Paul found out the Delaware Room is not available, let's do it at my house.  I'd say 11:00 a.m. if that could work.  Or, you all tell me.

Juanita Brown
jbrown341@verizon.net
(c) 562-506-4058
(h) 702-915-7048
No act of kindness is ever wasted

Join with Google Meet: https://meet.google.com/brr-ifmj-eaw

Learn more about Meet at: https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9282720
